articles.title: Live updates: Iran war ceasefire deadline looms as Strait of Hormuz closed again - CNN
articles.description: Washington and Tehran are “far from a final agreement,” says Iran’s parliament speaker. Trump earlier said talks are progressing but Iran “got a little cute.” Follow for live updates.

articles.title: North Korea launches multiple short-range ballistic missiles toward sea - AP News
articles.description: South Korea says North Korea has launched multiple ballistic missiles toward the North’s eastern waters. South Korea’s Joint Chiefs of Staff says the launches happened on Sunday morning from the North’s eastern Sinpo area. It says South Korea has bolstered it…

articles.title: Iran war: Tehran says 'progress' made in talks with US - DW.com
articles.description: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said there was still "a big distance" between the two sides. Iran on Saturday again closed the Strait of Hormuz. Follow DW for more.

articles.title: When an Iowa teen goes missing, a determined group of investigators make it their mission to find her - CBS News
articles.description: After Jade Colvin, a missing Iowa teenager, is tracked to a remote farm, photos discovered on an old cellphone reveal important clues.

articles.description: A new deal is expected to happen, sooner than later.

articles.title: Zayn Malik Allegedly Punched Louis Tomlinson Leaving Him Concussed: Report - TMZ
articles.description: Sorry, One Direction fans ... a reunion seems ever less likely to happen -- because a new report claims Zayn Malik slugged Louis Tomlinson.

articles.title: US Coast Guard spots overturned vessel near Saipan during search for missing ship - NPR
articles.description: The Mariana is a 145-foot dry cargo vessel registered in the U.S. It suffered engine failure Wednesday as a massive typhoon bore down on Saipan and nearby islands.

Trump voters say the pope should 'stay in his lane' and butt out of the Iran war - NBC News
articles.description: Trump's supporters in Nevada and Arizona believe that Pope Leo XIV is in the wrong, not the president, in their spat over the Iran war.

articles.title: Midwest, Great Lakes brace for more severe storms after night of tornadoes - CBS News
articles.description: Severe thunderstorms were forecast across the Southern Plains, Mississippi Valley and Great Lakes on Saturday.

articles.title: Appeals court allows Trump's White House ballroom construction to continue into June - NBC News
articles.description: A federal appeals court allowed construction to continue on President Donald Trump's new White House ballroom until June, just a day after a federal judge halted progress.

articles.description: The Houston Rockets (52-30) and Los Angeles Lakers (53-29) will meet in Game 1 of their first-round NBA playoff series tonight. Tipoff from Crypto.com Arena in Los Angeles, California

articles.title: A mass shooting in Ukraine's capital leaves 6 dead before police shot and killed the gunman - NPR
articles.description: A gunman has killed six people and injured at least 14 in a mass shooting in Ukraine's capital before he was shot and killed by police.

articles.title: Samsung To Release New Free Upgrade To Millions Of Galaxy Phones - Forbes
articles.description: Samsung is bringing a major free Galaxy S26 upgrade to millions of Galaxy phones via the One UI 8.5 release.
